name: Arma 3
author: ops@refx.example
description: Bohemia's military sandbox. SteamCMD-installed dedicated server with mod and mission support.

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server
steamcmd +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 233780 validate +quit
# Steam Workshop mods (managed in the panel → WORKSHOP_ITEMS). Best-effort:
# failures never abort the base install. Requires a central Steam login that
# OWNS Arma 3 for most Workshop items (anonymous can't fetch them).
WS_APP="${WORKSHOP_APP_ID:-107410}"
if [ -n "${WORKSHOP_ITEMS:-}" ]; then
  if [ -n "${STEAM_USERNAME:-}" ] && [ -n "${STEAM_PASSWORD:-}" ]; then
    for id in $WORKSHOP_ITEMS; do
      echo "[workshop] downloading $id"
      steamcmd +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login "$STEAM_USERNAME" "$STEAM_PASSWORD" +workshop_download_item "$WS_APP" "$id" validate +quit || echo "[workshop] $id failed"
      src="/mnt/server/steamapps/workshop/content/$WS_APP/$id"
      [ -d "$src" ] && ln -sfn "$src" "/mnt/server/@ws_$id" || true
    done
  else
    echo "[workshop] WORKSHOP_ITEMS set but no central Steam login configured — skipping (set it in Admin → Settings → Steam)."
  fi
fi
echo 'Arma 3 install complete.'

variables.description: Name shown in the in-game server browser.
Leave blank for a public server.

longDescription: Run large-scale milsim operations with full mod support on a dedicated Arma 3 server.
